title: GuarDeer Precision Entry System
author: yaduvansiit
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: GuarDeer Precision Entry System by yaduvansiit.
GUARDEER-V1 – Advanced Price Action Smart Money Indicator GUARDEER-V1 ek powerful Price Action & Smart Money Concept (SMC) based indicator hai jo market structure ko clearly visualize karta hai.
Yeh indicator traders ko BOS, CHoCH, Order Blocks, Fair Value Gaps, Premium/Discount Zones aur Multi-Timeframe trend direction ek hi chart par provide karta hai.
